allow: Bash(claude /plugin marketplace add obra/superpowers-marketplace 2>&1 || echo "Command failed, trying alternative...")

Bash(echo "在 IDEA 中按 Cmd+Shift+O，然后输入以下路径打开：
~/.claude/plugins/installed/everything-claude-code")

Bash(open "obsidian://open?vault=%E5%B0%8F%E4%BA%8C%E7%AC%94%E8%AE%B0/%E5%B0%8F%E4%BA%8CAI&file=Superpowers-vs-ECC-%E5%AF%B9%E6%AF%94%E5%88%86%E6%9E%90.md" 2>&1 || open -a Obsidian "/Users/wangyijun/Documents/xiaoer_daily/小二笔记/小二AI/Superpowers-vs-ECC-对比分析.md" 2>&1)

Bash(open "obsidian://open?vault=%E5%B0%8F%E4%BA%8C%E7%AC%94%E8%AE%B0/%E5%B0%8F%E4%BA%8CAI&file=Everything-Claude-Code-%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E9%80%BB%E8%BE%91%E5%88%86%E6%9E%90.md" 2>&1 || open -a Obsidian "/Users/wangyijun/Documents/xiaoer_daily/小二笔记/小二AI/Everything-Claude-Code-业务逻辑分析.md" 2>&1)
Bash(ls -la claude/utils/ claude/agents/xe-*.md 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ls -la claude/agents/ | grep xe)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=claude+skill+stars:%3E%3D100&sort=best_match&order=desc&per_page=50" | jq -r '.items[] | "\\\(.owner.login\)/\\\(.name\)|\\\(.stargazers_count\)|\\\(.description\)|\\\(.html_url\)|\\\(.archived\)|\\\(.language\)|\\\(.updated_at\)"' 2>/dev/null || echo "API 调用失败")

Bash(echo "Query-4: AI agency/automation" && gh search repos --limit 50 "AI agency" --json name,owner,description,stars,url,updatedAt,primaryLanguage,isArchived,isFork,topics,licenseInfo 2>/dev/null || echo "API limit or error")
